title: Supply Chain Manager - Rail Vikas Nigam - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Rail Vikas Nigam - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rail Vikas Nigam family as a Supply Chain Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rail Vikas Nigam:
Rail Vikas Nigam is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rail Vikas Nigam!
